sections.heading: Steps
sections.body:
In the Aggregations pane, open the Save drop-down
menu and click `Save as`.

![Save pipeline as](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/query-save-pipeline.png)

Click the Save button to save your pipeline. Your pipeline
will be saved under the folder  icon in the top-left
corner of the pipeline builder.

sections.heading: Learn More
sections.body:
